testcase.name: test_status_for_created_session

failure.message: AssertionError: Internal Server Error assert 500 == 200 + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_arrow_escape.py:66: in test_status_for_created_session assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: Internal Server Error E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
